programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Paramedics Laura and Aaron prepare for double the complications when a pregnant mum goes into labour. In a first for the show, cameras follow the patient into hospital not to save a life, but to welcome a new one.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Aaron and Laura fear the worst as they rush to a teen victim of a shark bite. Ben and Mim must tackle a footy player who’s dislocated his shoulder and super mums, Sally and Olivia race to a terrified one year old with a severed finger.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
